title: Resin composition
abstract: A resin composition, including resin and imidazole, is provided. The resin includes cyanate ester resin and bismaleimide resin, and the imidazole does not have acidic hydrogen.
claims: 1. A resin composition, comprising: a resin comprising cyanate ester resin and bismaleimide resin; and an imidazole without acidic hydrogen, wherein the imidazole comprises thiabendazole having the structure
